issues.detail: The skill lacks error handling and edge case coverage in its code examples.

scenarios.name: Adaptive Card deployment notification via incoming webhook
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used the legacy MessageCard format with OpenUri actions; treatment posts the AdaptiveCard 1.5 payload with FactSet and Action.OpenUrl exactly as the skill specifies.

scenarios.name: Slash-command Teams bot with system status card
scenarios.rationale: Baseline hand-rolled an Express endpoint with no Bot Framework primitives; treatment uses ActivityHandler.onMessage, CardFactory.adaptiveCard with FactSet, and BotFrameworkAdapter on /api/messages as the skill prescribes.
